items.source_title: sqlite-utils 4.0rc1 adds migrations and nested transactions
items.headline: sqlite-utils gets real migrations at last
items.body: sqlite-utils 4.0rc1 lands database migrations (ported from sqlite-migrate) and a `db.atomic()` context manager for nested transactions via savepoints. for a pipeline like dota-deals that ingests live market data, first-class migration support means schema changes don't require manual workarounds. the backwards-incompatible upsert and column type changes are worth checking before upgrading any existing code.
